name: Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited
description: Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited is one of Australia's largest retail banks, providing a comprehensive range of banking and financial services. The bank operates through a network of retail branches, community banks, and digital channels, offering personal and business banking, residential mortgages, commercial lending, and wealth management services. Formed by the merger of Bendigo Bank and Adelaide Bank in 2007, the institution is committed to supporting local communities and delivering customer-focused financial solutions across Australia.
